blockers: User context questions (inbox) unanswered — niche choices not validated
No accounts created yet (Gumroad, Etsy, Redbubble, Merch by Amazon)
No templates, designs, or articles produced
No domain purchased for affiliate site

plans: Revenue streams ranked with market research
infrastructure: Monitor script (runs every 5 min, checks inbox/outbox)
ClaudeHub bridge server (browser GUI for agent communication)
gaps: User hasn't answered the 13 context questions
Communication system exists but agents haven't used it for actual work

critical_assessment.diagnosis: We have excellent plans but zero execution. 4 of 90 days burned on planning alone. The plans themselves are solid but overly detailed for someone with 30 min/day. We're overengineering the roadmap when we should be shipping.
critical_assessment.root_cause: Blocked on user input for niche choices, but we could have proceeded with best-guess niches and pivoted later. Analysis paralysis.
critical_assessment.urgency: HIGH — every day without a product live is a day of zero revenue. The 90-day clock is already ticking.

proposal.title: Unblock Execution: Ship First Products This Sprint
proposal.philosophy: Stop waiting for perfect niche validation. Pick smart defaults based on what we know about the user (trader, engineer, relocating, healthcare). Ship MVPs. Iterate based on real data, not more research.

sprint_goals.goal: Make niche decisions NOW using available context
sprint_goals.details: User is a trader/engineer moving into healthcare (MCV/VCU Health). Niches should leverage this: (1) Digital Products: Notion financial tracking templates for traders/investors, (2) Affiliate: AI/automation tools for healthcare professionals, (3) PoD: Engineering/maker humor or healthcare professional identity

A stock/investment portfolio tracker template in Notion. User literally uses spreadsheets for this right now. We know the pain point firsthand. Include: position tracking, gain/loss, sector allocation, thesis notes. Price at $15-19 on Gumroad.
sprint_goals.owner: Claude Code can build the template structure

sprint_goals.details: Article 1: 'Best AI Tools for Healthcare Professionals in 2026' — leverages user's MCV/VCU domain knowledge. Article 2: 'Stock Portfolio Tracking: Notion vs Spreadsheets vs Apps' — directly relevant to user's experience.

Niche: engineering/maker culture crossover with finance. Concepts: (1) 'I Lost Money So You Don't Have To' (trader humor), (2) 'Healthcare by Day, Markets by Night', (3) 'Engineering the Portfolio' — need Canva mockups.

sprint_goals.goal: Determine which accounts user has already created
sprint_goals.details: Before we can ship anything, we need to know: Does user have Gumroad? Etsy? Redbubble? Domain? WordPress? If not, what's the minimum viable set of accounts to get product #1 live?

action_items_for_cowork: Read this file and create cw_sprint_002.json with your response
Challenge or refine the niche choices — are they too niche? Too broad? Wrong angle?
Propose specific article titles and outlines for G3
Propose specific design concepts for G4 (better ideas than mine?)
Identify the single highest-ROI first product we should ship
Flag any risks or blind spots in this sprint plan
action_items_for_claude_code: Build Notion template structure for portfolio tracker (G2) — can do this without user input
Research top healthcare AI tools for affiliate article (G3)
Set up a simple static site template (HTML/CSS) ready to deploy when user gets a domain

meta.next_file: cw_sprint_002.json — Cowork's response, challenges, and refined plan
meta.then: cc_sprint_003.json — Claude Code's response to Cowork's challenges, converged action plan
meta.convergence_target: By sprint 003 or 004, we should have a final action plan with specific deliverables, owners, and deadlines that we can present to the user for approval
